overall.description: Nighttime driving through a rain-soaked futuristic metropolis in Cyberpunk 2077. The vehicle navigates an elevated highway surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in vibrant neon holographic advertisements, with wet asphalt reflecting the colorful city lights. The driver takes a scenic exit to pause at an overlook before continuing through the neon-lit urban canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway through neon downtown district

agents.ego_description: cruising along the elevated highway at moderate speed, navigating through light traffic while surrounded by towering neon-lit skyscrapers

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking on the left lane

entered.detail: massive vertical digital billboard displaying a purple-tinted advertisement on a futuristic building facade
metal safety barrier with integrated yellow lighting strips running along the elevated highway edge
tall futuristic lamp posts emitting bright white light along the highway median
dense collection of glass and steel skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements and neon signage

segments.scene_description: Driving along an elevated highway through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night. The wet road surface reflects the vibrant purple and blue neon lights from massive holographic billboards covering the surrounding skyscrapers, while other vehicles navigate the multi-lane road.

scene_state.functional_zone: spiral exit ramp with scenic city overlook

events.description: vehicle slows down and takes the right exit ramp curving away from the main highway
vehicle comes to a complete stop at the overlook to view the neon cityscape

agents.ego_description: taking the scenic exit ramp and slowing to a stop at an overlook to observe the dense neon-lit cityscape and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: large green neon hologram of a samurai warrior with a sword, advertising a brand on the side of a building
curved descending roadway with reflective barriers leading down from the elevated highway
panoramic view of the downtown district with multiple layers of neon signs and illuminated skyscrapers

segments.scene_description: The vehicle exits the main highway onto a spiral ramp, descending and stopping at a scenic overlook. A massive green samurai hologram becomes prominently visible among the dense cluster of neon advertisements, while the purple billboard now appears closer and more central in the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban highway continuing through downtown district

events.description: vehicle accelerates away from the overlook and merges back into the highway traffic flow

agents.ego_description: accelerating away from the overlook and rejoining the flow of traffic, continuing the journey through the neon-lit city streets

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: tall digital advertisement screen displaying cyan and blue graphics on a building facade
elevated roadway structure with support pillars passing overhead

segments.scene_description: Accelerating away from the overlook, the vehicle rejoins the highway traffic. The green samurai hologram recedes into the background as new neon signs come into view, while the purple billboard fades into the distance on the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey along a rain-soaked elevated highway that dips into a scenic urban overlook before accelerating back into the neon-lit city flow. It begins with a drive through a futuristic metropolis, where the wet asphalt reflects vibrant purple and blue light from massive holographic billboards towering over the multi-lane road. As the vehicle exits the main highway, the camera descends a spiral ramp to a stop at an overlook, bringing a massive green samurai hologram and a central purple billboard into sharp, prominent focus. The scene then shifts as the vehicle accelerates away from the vista and rejoins the traffic, causing the green samurai to recede into the background. Finally, the purple billboard fades into the distance on the left as the camera pushes forward, revealing a new array of neon signs within the urban canyon.
